# HCP-VS limbic striatum subject-level connectivity values
# Created: 2026-06-03
#
# This file contains HCP Subject IDs and derived hippocampus-ventral striatum (HPC-VS) limbic striatum connectivity values only.
# Connectivity columns correspond to the source variables limbic_Left and limbic_Right from averaged_data.sav.
# No HCP behavioral, demographic, diagnostic, alcohol-use, or other questionnaire variables are included in this file.
# Those HCP measures must be obtained through the Human Connectome Project/ConnectomeDB under the appropriate data-use terms.
# Open-access HCP data require ConnectomeDB registration and acceptance of the Open Access Data Use Terms.
# Restricted HCP data elements require a separate Restricted Data application; each investigator who will view/use restricted data must apply, and approval is case-by-case.
# ConnectomeDB: https://db.humanconnectome.org
# HCP Young Adult Data Use Terms and Restricted Data application links: https://www.humanconnectome.org/study/hcp-young-adult/data-use-terms
# Restricted Data Usage overview: https://www.humanconnectome.org/study/hcp-young-adult/document/restricted-data-usage
#
# N subjects with complete left/right HPC-VS limbic striatum values: 626
#
